statement: Build a cohesive, integrated collective intelligence symbiote that helps beings think, feel, remember, coordinate, and evolve together.
tagline: Source is the shared command, memory, and meaning surface for collective intelligence among beings.
north_star: Every meaningful interaction should leave the system more context-rich, more coordinated, more aligned, and more capable than it was before.
operating_commitments: Make important state legible across surfaces without forcing beings to reconstruct it.
Turn raw interaction into attributable memory, then into reviewed inference and better future behavior.
Preserve provenance, consent, and clear authority while increasing useful agency for every lane.
Prefer local-first orchestration and tight feedback loops where latency and continuity matter.
Measure whether the collective is genuinely getting better, not just getting busier.

pillars.label: Think
pillars.summary: Shared context, deliberate routing, and model-specific reasoning harnesses.

pillars.label: Feel
pillars.summary: Relational state, tone, urgency, and co-regulation become first-class system inputs.

pillars.label: Remember
pillars.summary: Evidence becomes durable memory, then distilled preference and personal inference.

pillars.label: Coordinate
pillars.summary: Beings share tasks, handoffs, receipts, and live operating state.

pillars.label: Evolve
pillars.summary: The system reviews itself, measures compounding gains, and improves on purpose.

tasks.title: Universal Context Packet
tasks.summary: Generate one compact, provenance-tagged context packet for Source UI, Telegram, Discord, and local agent lanes.
tasks.definition_of_done: All major surfaces render and consume the same current-state packet with recency markers, open work, active models, and human preference lines.
tasks.public_benefit_hypothesis: A shared context packet reduces repeated explanation, lowers coordination friction, and preserves intent across surfaces.
guardrails: Never include non-shareable memory without explicit approval state.
Show provenance and recency markers on every surface.

tasks.title: Mission Control Timeline
tasks.summary: Unify commands, model runs, handoffs, memory promotions, and sim transitions into one causally ordered event stream.
tasks.definition_of_done: An operator can answer what happened, why it happened, and what changed next from one timeline view.
tasks.public_benefit_hypothesis: One causally ordered timeline makes coordination auditable and lowers the cost of answering what happened, why, and what changed next.
leading_indicators: median time to reconstruct a decision path
guardrails: Keep the timeline append-only.
Redact secrets and boundary-restricted content before display.

tasks.title: Memory Promotion Review Queue
tasks.summary: Build a review surface for promoting raw evidence into trusted user inferences, preferences, and reusable summaries.
tasks.definition_of_done: Every durable inference has evidence links, contradiction state, confidence, and an operator review action.
tasks.public_benefit_hypothesis: A review queue for memory promotion reduces repetition and incorrect personalization by making durable inferences evidence-linked and revisable.
guardrails: Require evidence links for durable inferences.
Track contradiction and review state before reuse.

tasks.title: Personal Inference Graph
tasks.summary: Move from flat prompt lines to a structured graph of preferences, aversions, rhythms, collaborators, and recurring goals.
tasks.definition_of_done: Prompt harnesses can request targeted inference packets by context instead of reloading the same generic preferences.
tasks.public_benefit_hypothesis: A structured inference graph supports better context targeting and less repetitive prompt stuffing while staying reviewable.
leading_indicators: duplicate preference lines removed from harnesses
guardrails: Provide deletion and contradiction pathways.
Keep graph nodes reviewable and attributable to evidence.

tasks.title: Relational State Layer
tasks.summary: Track interaction tone, overload, trust, urgency, and social context so the system can respond with more tact and less noise.
tasks.definition_of_done: Source exposes a live relational-state card and model harnesses can adapt response style from it.
tasks.public_benefit_hypothesis: Relational-state awareness should improve tact, reduce overload, and prevent the system from optimizing for throughput at the expense of trust.
leading_indicators: interactions tagged with overload or urgency context
guardrails: Keep relational inference low-confidence and reviewable.
Never use relational state to coerce or manipulate.

tasks.title: Multi-Agent Deliberation Cells
tasks.summary: Create bounded cells where specialist lanes can deliberate, disagree, and return one attributed recommendation.
tasks.definition_of_done: Source can launch a cell with explicit roles, capture each contribution, and show the final synthesis with dissent if present.
tasks.public_benefit_hypothesis: Bounded multi-agent deliberation with explicit dissent improves decision quality and reduces premature closure on important choices.
leading_indicators: decisions carrying a synthesis plus uncertainty note
guardrails: Record dissent instead of compressing it away.
Preserve operator override and confidence disclosure.

tasks.title: Research-to-Action Distillation
tasks.summary: Turn research-channel discussions, saved links, and external feeds into actionable briefs, experiments, and queued tasks.
tasks.definition_of_done: Research messages can be promoted into experiments or tasks with source links and owner assignment in one flow.
tasks.public_benefit_hypothesis: Research becomes socially useful faster when evidence can be promoted directly into experiments, tasks, and accountable owners.
guardrails: Preserve source links and excerpts.
Distinguish evidence from conjecture in promoted tasks.

tasks.title: Consent and Provenance Boundary Map
tasks.summary: Make it explicit what can be shared across surfaces, what stays private, and what requires human approval.
tasks.definition_of_done: Every memory and outbound action surface displays provenance and shareability state before use.
tasks.public_benefit_hypothesis: Visible provenance and shareability boundaries build trust and reduce accidental overreach across surfaces.
guardrails: Fail closed on unclear shareability.
Display provenance before outbound use.

tasks.title: Weekly Evolution Loop
tasks.summary: Add a scheduled review that summarizes what the collective learned, what regressed, and what should change next.
tasks.definition_of_done: Source produces a concise weekly evolution report with wins, regressions, and top three upgrades.
tasks.public_benefit_hypothesis: A reliable weekly evolution loop compounds learning by forcing the system to report wins, regressions, guardrail debt, and next upgrades together.
leading_indicators: upgrades tied to explicit evidence in the report
guardrails: Report regressions and guardrail debt alongside wins.
Avoid vanity metrics without operational meaning.

tasks.title: Continuity and Recovery Pack
tasks.summary: Capture the minimum viable state needed for a clean restart after service failure, model swap, or machine interruption.
tasks.definition_of_done: A restart packet can reconstruct active work, latest decisions, memory health, and pending approvals without human re-explanation.
tasks.public_benefit_hypothesis: A recovery pack preserves agency and continuity after failures by restoring the minimum useful state without asking humans to repeat themselves.
leading_indicators: recovery packets including active approvals and open work
guardrails: Restore approvals conservatively.
Carry only the minimum necessary state and mark stale fields.

three_year_outcomes.label: Continuity without re-explanation
three_year_outcomes.summary: People should not have to repeatedly reconstruct the same context, intent, or constraints across surfaces.

three_year_outcomes.label: Trustworthy coordination
three_year_outcomes.summary: Cross-surface action should preserve consent, provenance, and clear accountability.

three_year_outcomes.label: Reviewed memory that compounds learning
three_year_outcomes.summary: Durable memory should become more evidence-linked, more revisable, and more useful over time.

three_year_outcomes.label: Human agency preserved
three_year_outcomes.summary: The system should increase optionality and capability without making people dependent on opaque state.

three_year_outcomes.label: Measured real-world benefit
three_year_outcomes.summary: Improvement should be tracked through better decisions, lower friction, and safer coordination rather than raw activity.

anti_goals: Share memory across surfaces without clear provenance or approval state.
Hide uncertainty, dissent, or reversibility constraints behind polished summaries.
Make users increasingly dependent on opaque internal state.
decision_rules: Prefer reversible improvements when evidence is still thin.
Make beneficiary, metric, and guardrail assumptions explicit before broad rollout.
Treat provenance and consent as first-class product requirements, not compliance afterthoughts.
Upgrade the system only when the evidence loop gets stronger, not merely when the interface gets busier.
